headline: Diamondback Energy Debt Tender Highlights Evolving Post Endeavor Merger Valuation
summary: Diamondback Energy (NasdaqGS:FANG) launched cash tender offers to repurchase certain long term senior notes due 2051 and 2052. The offers are part of continued balance sheet management following the company’s merger with Endeavor Energy. The transaction focuses on long dated debt that influences Diamondback Energy’s future interest costs and capital structure. Diamondback Energy, a large independent oil and gas producer, is reshaping its capital structure after combining with Endeavor...

headline: Shares of oil and gas companies are trading lower after President Trump posted on social media that the U.S. will work closely with Iran and that many of the 15 points in the proposed plan to end the war have been agreed to, signaling a de-escalation in the Middle East conflict and related supply chain constraints.
